title: Rajasthan RSSB Patwari Recruitment 2025 Final Result + Apply Online
excerpt: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB Patwari Recruitment 2025 Final Result is out. Apply online from 22 February 2025 to 23 March 2025.

About Organization

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Rajasthan.
The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the state.

About the Programme

The Rajasthan RSSB Patwari Recruitment 2025 is a government job recruitment program aimed at selecting eligible candidates for the post of Patwari in Rajasthan.
The program is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria.
